Name: Average time impact of Declaration REJECTED by MISSING occurrence on total case duration
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and the end of the case

Name: Average time for Declaration REJECTED by MISSING in cases that also contain a Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER occurs

Name: Average time for Declaration REJECTED by MISSING in variants where it occurs
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and the end of the case

Name: Percentage of total case time spent in Declaration REJECTED by MISSING
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and the end of the case

Name: Average time from Declaration REJECTED by MISSING to Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average time difference: Declaration REJECTED by MISSING duration vs Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER duration
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER occurs

Name: Minimum time between Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and the next activity in the case
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and the end of the case

Name: Average time difference: Declaration REJECTED by MISSING duration vs Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR duration
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR occurs

Name: Minimum time for Declaration REJECTED by MISSING
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and the end of the case

Name: Total time for Declaration REJECTED by MISSING
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and the end of the case

Name: Average time from Declaration REJECTED by MISSING to Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'", 'end': "activity == 'Declaration SAVED by EMP"}"

Name: Minimum waiting time to the Declaration REJECTED by MISSING
Metric: The minimum of the duration between the start of the case and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by MISSING
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Average time difference between the duration of Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and the duration of Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER occurs

Name: Average time difference between the duration of Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and the duration of Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR occurs

Name: Average time from Declaration REJECTED by MISSING to the end of the case (Payment Handled)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Total time until Declaration REJECTED by MISSING is performed
Metric: The sum of the duration between the start of the case and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Average time difference between the duration of Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and the duration of Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION occurs

Name: Time until Declaration REJECTED by MISSING
Metric: The average of the duration between the start of the case and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Average time between Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER and Declaration REJECTED by MISSING in cases containing both rejections
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER and activity Declaration REJECTED by MISSING for cases where activity Declaration REJECTED by MISSING occurs

Name: Average time from Declaration REJECTED by MISSING to Payment Handled in rework loops
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Average time from Declaration REJECTED by MISSING to Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in rework loops
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Total waiting time to the Declaration REJECTED by MISSING
Metric: The sum of the duration between the start of the case and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Minimum time between Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR and Declaration REJECTED by MISSING
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Average time from Declaration REJECTED by MISSING to the final rejection (Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE) in abandonment paths
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average time for a case variant containing Declaration REJECTED by MISSING
Metric: the average of the duration between the first time instant when <ppinot4py.model.states.RuntimeState object at 0x7fc9ef3c5750> - AppliesTo.PROCESS and the last time instant when <ppinot4py.model.states.RuntimeState object at 0x7fc9ef3c5790> - AppliesTo.PROCESS filtered by the function ma > 0 where ma is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'
